title: 24 Agents tasked to build a $1B app
summary: David Ondrej presents a project where 24 AI agents are tasked with building a $1 billion dollar application, showcasing multi-agent collaboration for software development. The video demonstrates practical AI coding capabilities and promotes AI education and recruitment.
